message:
fix(fr-server): add Drop impls for connections and clarify poll timeout branches

Connection cleanup:
- Add Drop for ReplicaPrimaryConnection: explicitly shuts down the TCP
  stream on drop so the remote end gets a clean FIN instead of a RST
- Add Drop for ClientConnection: same clean-shutdown behavior for client
  sockets, preventing connection-reset errors on the client side

Poll timeout refactor:
- Split the combined if-else that mixed zero-timeout and blocked-client
  cases into three distinct branches for clarity:
  1. tick_plan says 0 -> immediate poll (work ready)
  2. has_blocked clients -> 100ms short poll (check timeouts/data)
  3. otherwise -> use tick_plan's computed timeout
- No behavioral change, just makes the three cases explicit

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
